subcodes.first_line: Say: Now hath the leave been granted from the Book of God, and by this let them that are lowly rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی العظیم. قل الآن جاء الاذن من کتاب الله و ان بذلک فلیفرح الخاشعون
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @contention and conflict
